recommendation: Move 5 nurses from Maternity to ICU during evening and weekend peaks.
rationale: ICU average occupancy is 96% with 56.7 minute average waits.
estimated_impact: Expected 10-18% wait-time reduction and improved throughput during surge windows.

recommendation: Create a flexible surge pool of 8 beds for ICU and adjacent high-acuity pathways.
rationale: Sustained occupancy above 85% increases boarding risk and delays discharges.
estimated_impact: Expected 6-12% improvement in bed availability and lower left-without-being-seen risk.

recommendation: Add protected diagnostic blocks for Emergency and shift non-urgent MRI/CT to low-demand mornings.
rationale: Equipment utilization averages 90.2%, indicating scheduling bottlenecks.
estimated_impact: Expected 8-15% reduction in diagnostic turnaround time.
